top_papers.title: SpanVLA: Efficient Action Bridging and Learning from Negative-Recovery Samples for VLA
top_papers.summary_cn: 提出高效动作桥接（VLM推理+流匹配动作专家）和GRPO负样本学习，在NAVSIM v1/v2达到领先水平

top_papers.title: OneDrive: Unified Multi-Paradigm Driving with Vision-Language-Action Models
top_papers.summary_cn: 统一VLA驾驶框架，单因果解码器处理文本、检测、轨迹，nuScenes L2 0.28, NAVSIM 86.8 PDMS

top_papers.title: PokeVLA: Pocket-Sized VLA with Comprehensive World Knowledge Guidance
top_papers.summary_cn: 紧凑型VLA模型，两阶段训练（VLM预训练→操作知识注入），LIBERO-Plus SOTA

top_papers.title: X-Cache: Cross-Chunk Block Caching for Few-Step Autoregressive World Models
top_papers.summary_cn: 跨块缓存加速自回归世界模型推理，首次支持少步蒸馏模型，训练无关即插即用

top_papers.title: WorldMark: A Unified Benchmark Suite for Interactive Video World Models
top_papers.summary_cn: 首个统一交互式视频世界模型评测基准，支持6个主流模型苹果对比，在线Arena平台
